title: Heart-Shaped Box
why_this_song: Heart-Shaped Box by Nirvana (1993) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Forever in debt to your priceless advice
Meat-eating orchids forgive no one just yet
Cut myself on angel hair and baby's breath
Broken hymen of Your Highness, I'm left black

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "advice" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "advice" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Cut myself on angel hair and baby's breath
Forever in debt to your priceless advice

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Heart-Shaped Box" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Heart-Shaped Box" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Heart-Shaped Box", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Heart-Shaped Box", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Heart-Shaped Box" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Heart-Shaped Box" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Heart-Shaped Box" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Heart-Shaped Box"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "Heart-Shaped Box" was released in 1993. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Heart-Shaped Box" foi lançada em 1993. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Nirvana one question about "Heart-Shaped Box", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Nirvana sobre "Heart-Shaped Box", o que seria e por quê?
